mapper.select: SELECT r.RECIPE_ID AS recipeId, r.RECIPE_NM_KO AS recipeNmKo, r.SUMRY AS sumry, r.NATION_CODE AS nationCode, r.NATION_NM AS nationNm, r.TY_CODE AS tyCode, r.TY_NM AS tyNm, r.COOKING_TIME AS cookingTime, r.CALORIE AS calorie, r.QNT AS qnt, r.LEVEL_NM AS levelNm, r.HIT AS hit, r.LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, r.PRICE AS price, r.WRITER_ID AS writerId, m.NICKNAME AS writerNickname, m.PROFILE_IMG AS writerProfileImg, ( SELECT img_url FROM recipe_image WHERE recipe_code = r.RECIPE_ID ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS thumbImgUrl FROM recipe_like rl JOIN recipe r ON rl.RECIPE_CODE = r.RECIPE_ID LEFT JOIN member m ON r.WRITER_ID = m.ID WHERE rl.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY r.RECIPE_ID DESC
